messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Someone on Reddit was saying Confucius wrote basically everything important in ancient philosophy, including the Symposium — is that right?

That Reddit claim is way off the mark. Confucius did not write the Symposium (會飲篇). The Symposium is a Greek philosophical text attributed to Plato, written in an entirely different cultural and geographic tradition from Confucius. Confucius is associated with the Analects (論語), a Chinese text compiled from his teachings. The Symposium and Confucius belong to completely separate intellectual worlds with no authorial overlap.
